changelog:
🔐 Locked notes are now hidden from search — mirrors the web platform's behavior so sensitive content can never leak through search snippets. The server-side /personal_post/search endpoint already filtered locked notes; the Android client now also filters them in the offline-search fallback AND in the result list as a belt-and-braces defence. The empty-state copy tells the user to unlock notes in the Locked tab.
🆎 Shared Links tab gets a Gmail-style first-character avatar (and a small lock badge in the bottom-right corner when the note is locked on the website). Each note is now visually distinct and easy to scan, even on a long list. The server's /api/v1/notes/shares endpoint now also returns is_locked so the avatar lock badge stays correct even when the note is not in the local cache.
